title: Saturday Firelight Supper
description: Catering menu featuring Chef Lucia's Firelight Tomato Braise as the anchor dish.

entries.note: Serve with grilled sourdough and charred seasonal vegetables.

composition.sequencingNotes: Begin with lighter starters, then present braise as centerpiece.

balanceNotes.flavor: Smoky and bright with mild heat.
balanceNotes.texture: Silky sauce over crisp grilled bread.
balanceNotes.pacing: Best served in second course window.

lineage.note: Built from prior seasonal tasting framework.
